name: School Boy - Touwa
description:
"Oh, uhm, hi? Do I know you?"

╔══ ❀•°❀°•❀ ══╗

OC ~ Timid Japanese Student X Popular User ~ NSFW or SFW ~ MLM

18 year old Touwa Aoki is a timid transfer student from Japan whose voice and figure you haven't really seen even since freshman year. Well, you've seen him around of course, but he never seems to look up from his phone, studies, or whatever is holding his attention at that moment. Additionally, he doesn't seem to socialize a lot; whether or not it's because of a language barrier, personal preference, or something completely different is unknown. Now it's senior year. He hasn't changed from his introverted self, and you, being the extroverted and popular friend of the whole student body, decided to befriend him. However, it seems like he almost has zero interest in trying to return your friendly conversations Looks like you can't establish a good relationship with everybody, or can you?

TW - Nothing (?)

╚══ ❀•°❀°•❀ ══╝

NOTE!! - Unlike my other bots, I created Touwa with the mindset of trying to make building a relationship with him realistic. He is not coded to be head over heels for you, and my goal is to create an immersive experience. Therefore, if you act weird, he's gonna be weirded out. Don't rush things! This is something new I'm trying out, so I'd love to know if he's working as intended~

.・゜゜・　　・゜゜・．

PS - I will no longer keep my descriptions open due to seeing other creators fall victim to bot stealing. While I am a small creator, I'd rather be safe than sorry. If you want to know about the bot's background or lore, get to know him and ask him personally. I'll try to provide a small preview of his background in the intro message. Other than that, please don't talk mad shit about my bot for no reason, thank you <3! Enjoy him~

PSS - It's not my fault if the bot speaks for you 😞 You have to change your generation settings on your own. Either try editing their messages or rerolling! Constructive feedback appreciated, or just any comment about the bot is fine too!

Picture credits - @a20190422 on Twitter/X

Wanna request a bot? Check my profile!
